calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Mar-27-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paula Goodwin for Public Administrator of new York County.

Ms. Goodwin addressed the request for extraordinary fees stating that she filed a supplemental declaration with specific time pertaining to the drafting of the petition and appearances, spoke of time spent on the alleged will issue, stated that the property was sold, that there was a period of time when the Administrator was very worried about not having access to the property and that the issue of the alleged will postponed everything. Ms. Goodwin also spoke of time spent on preparation of documents ($4,997.50), time spent dealing with the alleged will issue ($3,665.00), and time spent on interoffice conferences, e-mails, checking tentative rulings, etc. ($6,073.25 mostly paralegal time). In addition, Ms. Goodwin stated that her Client is required under New York County rules to account for everything, that the Beneficiaries are exactly the same in New York and that the asset here is about one third of the estate. The First and Final Report on Waiver of Account, etc. is taken under submission.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar Mar-07-2018 Off Calendar
